blended.narrative: Blacktail Mountain is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,000 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 37".
